title: Rewritten End Credits
description: Adds unsettling new End credits to make your world feel alive, and not alone. Also adds 2 new secret splash texts!
body:
# Rewritten End Credits ✨

**Rewritten End Credits** transforms the Minecraft endgame experience by replacing the vanilla End credits with a mysterious, unsettling narrative that adds layers of uncertainty and intrigue. Alongside this, the mod refreshes the main menu splash texts by introducing two secret messages that hint on something...👁️‍🗨️

Perfect for players who want their journey’s end to feel deeper and more haunting, this lightweight texture pack subtly shifts the tone of Minecraft’s finale without altering gameplay or visuals.  

## Features 🔥

- Rewritten, atmospheric End credits text 📝  
- Two new secret splash texts on the main menu ✨  
- Fully Vanilla 🎮  

---

![Crossed out is the player's name. This is a small snippet of the rewritten end credits from the mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12c24e4136b47cf834de5118720932dbe51abdbd.png)
